changelog:
🔒 Correct PIN now unlocks locked notes offline; PIN no longer wiped on logout.
📵 Fixed offline loop — 'Continue Offline' no longer bounces back to Welcome, and no sync at startup while offline.
🗑️ Logging out now removes your account's notes from the device while keeping your offline notes safe.
✨ Smoother scrolling & navigation — no more redundant syncs when moving between screens.
